description_long: This is a soft, knitted stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a light tan body and darker brown accents on its belly, paws, and inner ears. The bear has a large, round, dark brown patch on its belly, bordered by white stitching that gives a hand-sewn appearance. Its face features two round black eyes, a small black nose, and a white snout with a stitched black mouth, creating a gentle and approachable look. The arms and legs are short and rounded, with brown patches on the hands and feet, and the ears are small and rounded, positioned symmetrically on top of the head. The texture of the toy is visibly knitted, suggesting a soft and cuddly feel. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A soft, knitted bear stuffed toy with a tan body, brown belly patch, and stitched facial features. It has a gentle expression and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, stitched white snout, brown belly patch, and brown patches on the hands and feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, rounded limbs, and the protruding snout and ear.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain tan knitted surface and the back of the head and limbs, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, rounded limbs, and the brown patch on the right arm.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with round black eyes, a small black nose, and a stitched black mouth on a white snout. The features give the bear a friendly and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward, head facing forward.
